title: penstemon glaberrimus
intro: Penstemon glaberrimus, also known as smooth penstemon, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and promote healing.
